crm.title: CRM contacts
crm.subtitle: Clients and job sites for your company.
crm.client_name_required: Enter at least a name or company.
crm.link_subtitle: Associate this job with a client and site.
crm.interventions_empty: No jobs linked to this client.

event.intervention_report_rejected: Report rejected — sent back to tech

detail.heading: Detail
detail.empty_hint: Click a row in the feed to see a detailed explanation.

body.intervention_created: A new intervention case was recorded. It appears in tracking and can be assigned to a technician.
body.intervention_assigned: A technician accepted or received this assignment. The job is scheduled or being picked up.
body.intervention_status: The operational status of the case changed (planning, en route, on site, closure, etc.).
body.intervention_completed: Field work was completed by the technician. The case can move to validation or billing.
body.intervention_invoiced: The case is marked as invoiced: an invoice was generated or the commercial status is now invoiced.
body.intervention_technician_declined: The assigned technician declined the job. The case returns to the queue or must be reassigned.
body.intervention_returned_to_requests: The case was sent back to the back-office Requests queue with no active technician.
body.intervention_deleted: The case was permanently deleted or archived from the company workspace.
body.intervention_report_validated: The field report was validated; the case is ready for billing or administrative closure.
body.intervention_report_rejected: The field report was rejected by back-office; the technician must complete it before resubmission.
body.intervention_report_archived: The report was removed from the active inbox list and moved to the archive.
body.intervention_cancelled: The intervention was cancelled: no further field visit is planned.
body.intervention_schedule_updated: The intervention date or time slot was updated (client or dispatch planning).
body.intervention_billing_updated: Billing lines (excl. VAT, labels) or case amounts were updated.
body.intervention_payment_updated: Payment status or a recorded payment was updated on this case.
body.intervention_terrain_report_received: An end-of-job report (text, photos, signature) was submitted by the technician.
body.bridged_report_dismissed: An automatically imported field report was dismissed or hidden by back-office.
body.ivana_chat_message: A message in the Ivana chat linked to the client portal or case tracking.
body.material_order_status_changed: An internal material order status changed (draft, sent, received, etc.).
body.supplier_order_lecot: A Lecot supplier order was created or updated via the chatbot or materials hub.
body.chatbot_intervention_status: The chatbot changed the case status after user confirmation.
body.chatbot_timeline_comment: The chatbot added a comment to the case CRM timeline.
body.chatbot_email_sent: The chatbot sent an email related to the case (client, technician, or supplier).
body.chatbot_gmail_action: A Gmail action (read, link, reply) was performed via the chatbot on a related thread.
body.chatbot_write_action: The chatbot ran a confirmed write action (case data, stock, etc.).
body.material_ordered: A material request was placed to support the intervention (internal stock or preparation).
body.supplier_ordered: A supplier order was recorded (parts, consumables) for this context.
body.email_sent: An outbound email was sent from the platform or synced to the case.
body.email_received: An inbound email was received and linked to case or company activity.
body.commission_calculated: A sales commission was calculated or recalculated from company rules.
body.quote_created: A quote was created for the client linked to this case or request.
body.quote_status_changed: The quote status changed (draft, sent, accepted, declined, etc.).
body.time_entry_recorded: A technician time entry (travel, on site, break…) was recorded for this case.

crmHistory.agent_off_topic: I am the QM Agent — I analyze operational performance and quality. For stock, Lecot orders, or accounting, use the dedicated page.

ai.title: Quality Management Agent
ai.subtitle: Performance & quality
ai.info: The QM Agent analyzes your KPIs in real time and identifies quality issues.

companyStock.title: Materials
companyStock.agent_scope_hint: Materials & stock only — other topics declined.
companyStock.preview_banner: Business preview — install the catalog to save it to your company.
companyStock.preview_autopilot_hint: The button below approves demo requests and opens Chatbot with a purchase plan.
companyStock.seed_chatbot_prompt: Help me structure material stock for a locksmith business in Belgium: families, alert thresholds, and first Lecot order lines.
companyStock.pro_empty_body: Centralize cylinders, locks, keys and hardware. A pro catalog saves you from starting empty.
companyStock.pro_preview_body: Browse a realistic inventory. Save it to your company in one click.
companyStock.pro_bullets: Cylinders, barrels and multipoint locks|Locks, strikes and Lecot handles|Keys, badges and remotes|Hardware, seals and consumables
companyStock.autopilot_fix_all_sub: Approve field requests then launch Chatbot with full context
companyStock.autopilot_approve_sub: Approve all technician requests in one click
companyStock.autopilot_stock_sub: Chatbot suggests Lecot purchases and priorities
companyStock.feed_ok: Nothing urgent — one click for a summary.
companyStock.patron_subtitle: Stock-outs, thresholds and field orders — what the owner checks first.
companyStock.company_required: Select an active company to manage stock.
companyStock.table_subtitle: Sorted by urgency — stock-outs and thresholds first
companyStock.ai_hint: The Chatbot uses the same Firestore stock. Use shortcuts or open the full chat.
companyStock.ai_hint_patron: Approve field requests, track suppliers, then let the Chatbot prepare purchases.
companyStock.ai_suggestion_low: item(s) below threshold — Chatbot can order from Lecot.
companyStock.prompt_ruptures: List out-of-stock items and propose a prioritized purchase plan for a locksmith business.
companyStock.prompt_low_stock: List low-stock items and suggest next actions.
companyStock.prompt_lecot: Search Lecot products matching our current stock.
companyStock.prompt_order: Help me prepare a material order for an intervention.
companyStock.prompt_ask: Summarize company material stock and alerts to handle.
companyStock.center_main_subtitle: Main table — select a row, details on the right
companyStock.inspector_empty: Select a row in the central table.

chat.attach_blocked_title: Photos: configure Firebase Storage (bucket) for this project.
chat.toast_storage_unavailable: Firebase Storage unavailable — cannot send photos.
chat.toast_login_description: Please log in to use the chat.
chat.day_clients_empty: No clients scheduled for this date
chat.welcome: Hello — write to us for any question about an intervention, an appointment or an invoice. The back-office will reply here.
chat.reply_urgent: For an emergency, please provide your full address and a contact number; the back-office handles these cases as a priority.
chat.reply_billing: For billing or a quote, provide the name on the file or the last digits of the intervention reference — I will forward it to the relevant team.
chat.reply_schedule: To change a time slot, indicate the desired date and city; the back-office will confirm your schedule.
chat.reply_thanks: You're welcome! Don't hesitate if you have other questions.
chat.reply_default: Thank you for your message. The back-office has been notified and will get back to you shortly. You can also submit a request from the company space.

copilot.no_company: Select a company (switcher) to enable the assistant.

copilot.input_placeholder: e.g. Which urgent cases are open? Who has not paid?
